name: golden-skills
description: Marketplace de skills para Claude Code — referências, patterns e boas práticas.

plugins.name: golden-suite
plugins.description: All-in-one orchestrator: combines Clean Code, Clean Architecture, System Architecture, Design Patterns (C#/TS/Go), Impact Analysis, Prompt Architecture Review, and User Stories Craft in a single skill with on-demand reference loading.

plugins.name: design-patterns-csharp
plugins.description: Referência completa dos 22 Design Patterns (GoF) com exemplos em C#/.NET, diagramas Mermaid e orientação prática.

plugins.name: design-patterns-typescript
plugins.description: Referência completa dos 22 Design Patterns (GoF) com exemplos em TypeScript, diagramas Mermaid e orientação prática.

plugins.name: design-patterns-go
plugins.description: Catálogo dos 22 Design Patterns (GoF) com exemplos idiomáticos em Go, framework de decisão arquitetural e orientação sobre idiomas Go (composição, interfaces implícitas, goroutines/channels).

plugins.name: design-patterns
plugins.description: Referência agnóstica de linguagem dos 22 Design Patterns (GoF) com pseudocódigo, fundamentos de OOP, princípios de design e SOLID. Baseado em 'Dive Into Design Patterns' de Alexander Shvets (Refactoring.Guru).

plugins.name: refactoring-catalog
plugins.description: Catálogo de refatorações e code smells para melhoria estrutural preservando comportamento. Baseado em 'Refactoring: Improving the Design of Existing Code' de Martin Fowler.

plugins.name: csharp-quality-suite
plugins.description: Suite completa de qualidade C#/.NET: Clean Code (code smells, princípios), Clean Architecture (camadas, SOLID arquitetural, Dependency Rule) e System Architecture (diagramas, API design, multi-cloud, platform engineering).

plugins.name: impact-analysis
plugins.description: Análise de impacto pré-implementação com busca semântica LSP/Serena, perguntas assertivas, diagramas Mermaid e checklist de riscos.

plugins.name: langchain-skills
plugins.description: Skills oficiais da LangChain: LangGraph, LangChain fundamentals, RAG, Deep Agents, human-in-the-loop e persistência. (submodule: langchain-ai/langchain-skills)

plugins.name: langsmith-skills
plugins.description: Skills oficiais da LangSmith: tracing, datasets e evaluators para observabilidade e avaliação de agentes LLM. (submodule: langchain-ai/langsmith-skills)

plugins.name: prompt-architect
plugins.description: Senior prompt architecture reviewer for OpenAI API production systems. Reviews and rewrites system prompts, tool-calling instructions, structured outputs, multi-agent prompts, and RAG configurations across the full OpenAI model stack.

plugins.name: user-stories-craft
plugins.description: Skill para escrita, splitting, estimativa e gestao de user stories — do product vision ate developer-ready tasks. Baseado em Mike Cohn's User Stories Applied com praticas ageis modernas.

plugins.name: unit-testing
plugins.description: Guide for writing high-quality unit tests based on Roy Osherove's 'The Art of Unit Testing'. Covers test organization, naming, mocking/stubbing, testability, legacy code testing, and the three pillars of trustworthy, maintainable, and readable tests.

plugins.name: startup-cto-handbook
plugins.description: Startup engineering leadership guide from 'The Startup CTO's Handbook' by Zach Goldberg. Covers engineering management, hiring, 1:1s, performance reviews, tech debt, roadmaps, agile processes, architecture decisions, DevOps, team organization, and working with executives.

plugins.name: clean-code-typescript
plugins.description: Guia completo de Clean Code para TypeScript baseado nos princípios de Robert C. Martin. Cobre variáveis, funções, classes, SOLID, testes, concorrência, tratamento de erros, formatação, comentários e padrões TypeScript-específicos (branded types, discriminated unions, Result pattern, exhaustive checks).

plugins.name: data-intensive-apps
plugins.description: Practical reference for designing data-intensive applications — data models, storage engines, replication, partitioning, transactions, distributed systems, consistency, batch and stream processing. Based on 'Designing Data-Intensive Applications' by Martin Kleppmann (O'Reilly).
